item.title: @calebhammerlive did a whole video “responding” to me pointing out he is pushing a right wing narrative, and goes so far as to f...
RC is yet another classic right wing grifter grasping at any opportunity to degrade women and elevate men
item.description:
RC is yet another classic right wing grifter grasping at any opportunity to degrade women and elevate men. It is embarrassing but not very suprising from the "fact over feelings" crowd.

item.title: I am personally tired of repeating that this is exactly the purpose of the Democratic party, but this is perhaps the most clear ...
item.description:
I am personally tired of repeating that this is exactly the purpose of the Democratic party, but this is perhaps the most clear and best argument l’ve ever seen for. You can believe that l’m a Democrat better A TIC than the Republican, but if they are willing to lose instead of change, then it does not matter



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
